items.check: min graph cross-norm is positive, cone apex cross-norm is zero
items.inspection_target: the graph patch keeps a nonzero cross product; the cone parametrization collapses at the apex

items.check: sampled gradient norms have a positive lower bound
items.inspection_target: the gradient is never zero on the sampled level and is normal to the surface
items.representation: Plotly 3D ellipsoid mesh with gradient cones

items.check: Jacobian determinant is nonzero on the overlap samples
items.inspection_target: grid cells distort but the transition remains locally invertible away from the missing point
items.representation: SymPy Jacobian plus Matplotlib grid inversion

items.check: orthogonality and norm residuals are below tolerance
items.inspection_target: the pushed vector remains tangent at the image point and keeps its length
items.representation: Plotly sphere with tangent vector before and after a rotation map

items.check: symbolically, EG-F^2 equals squared cross-product norm
items.inspection_target: the metric ellipse narrows in the direction with larger surface stretch
items.item: first fundamental form on a helicoid

items.check: mesh area approaches 4*pi^2*R*r and the torus mesh has Euler characteristic zero
items.inspection_target: area is a metric determinant, not a picture-area guess
items.representation: Plotly helicoid density and Trimesh torus area refinement

items.check: torus normal agreement is positive; Mobius transported normal has dot product near -1
items.inspection_target: torus normals return coherently while the Mobius centerline normal flips after one circuit
items.item: orientation as a global compatibility test
items.representation: 3D normal fields on a torus and an open Mobius band
